title: lappula echinata var. occidentalis
intro: Lappula echinata var. occidentalis, also known as Western prickly ballhead, is a plant species within the borage family (Boraginaceae) and is native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lappula echinata var. occidentalis include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
